bounties.title: Add Python SDK Examples
bounties.description: Create a Python SDK with examples for interacting with SolFoundry's bounty API. Include authentication, bounty CRUD, and submission workflows.

bounties.title: Build Bounty Analytics Dashboard
bounties.description: Create a web dashboard showing bounty analytics: completion rates, average rewards, top contributors, and time-to-merge metrics.

bounties.title: Write Integration Tests for API
bounties.description: Add comprehensive integration tests for the SolFoundry REST API covering all bounty endpoints, auth flows, and error cases.
